{"type":"task_assignment","taskId":"5","subject":"Part C: Behavior engine pure functions + integration","description":"1. Create packages/common/src/randomization/behavior-context.ts with BehaviorRuntimeContext, WalletBehaviorStats, BehaviorDecisionRecord, WalletPersonality interfaces
2. Create packages/common/src/randomization/behavior-engine.ts with BehaviorEngine.computeDelay() and generateWalletPersonality()
3. Create packages/common/src/randomization/behavior-engine.spec.ts with tests
4. Create apps/api/src/modules/workflow-v2/engine/wallet-behavior-store.service.ts (Redis persistence)
5. Create apps/api/src/modules/workflow-v2/engine/behavior-context-provider.service.ts
6. Modify logic-human-delay.executor.ts to integrate BehaviorEngine
7. Add enableRuntimeAdjustment/enableCrossExecMemory/enableDecisionLogging to LogicHumanDelayParams in node-workflow.ts
8. Register providers in workflow-v2.module.ts","assignedBy":"behavior-agent","timestamp":"2026-03-06T05:12:10.556Z"}
